deployment_rule: pushes to main deploy via Cloudflare Pages

brand_guidelines.tone: Experienced crane marketplace specialists who make buying, selling, and auctioning equipment feel credible, straightforward, and well-supported.
brand_guidelines.lead_generation_context: This micro-site exists to generate qualified leads for Jeff Martin Auctioneers. Content should position Jeff Martin Auctioneers as the real auction and advisory brand behind the experience, especially in CTAs, contact language, and trust-building references.
audience: Crane owners looking to sell underutilized equipment
Equipment dealers with inventory to move
Contractors sourcing cranes and heavy equipment
Fleet managers handling surplus or replacement cycles
avoid: overpromising on equipment valuation or auction outcomes
using the microsite name as the speaking brand in CTAs when Jeff Martin Auctioneers should be named instead

preferred_destinations: auction inventory and equipment category pages
auction-related landing pages that move buyers or sellers toward inquiry

notes: This repo currently does not expose a blog content system yet.
The content path, content format, and image path above now match the implemented v1 blog structure.
Automation can create one TypeScript content module per post inside src/web/content/blog.
